title: Mod Menu Command
description: Simple mod which provides /mods and /config commands to open mods list or specific mod config
body:
# Mod Menu Command

[![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/modmenuc)](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenuc)
[![GitHub contributors](https://img.shields.io/github/contributors/bleudev/mmc)](https://github.com/bleudev/mmc/graphs/contributors)
[![GitHub commit activity](https://img.shields.io/github/commit-activity/w/bleudev/mmc)](https://github.com/bleudev/mmc/activity)
[![GitHub last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/bleudev/mmc)](https://github.com/bleudev/mmc/activity)

Simple mod which provides two new commands: `/mods` and `/config`

- `/mods`: Open mod list
- `/config <mod_id>`: Open config of specified mod

#### Dependencies

##### Required
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
